headline: Zoom Video to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: ZM heads into Q1 earnings results with more than 4% revenue growth outlook as AI expansion, enterprise traction and FX pressures shape expectations.

headline: Stocks Set to Open Lower as Oil Rises Amid Iran Impasse, Nvidia Earnings and Fed Minutes Awaited
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are down -0.41%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are down -0.30% this morning, pointing to a lower open on Wall Street as oil prices continue to rise amid the stalemate between the U.S. and Iran.

headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on Keysight Techs, Raises Price Target to $415
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Mehdi Hosseini   maintains Keysight Techs (NYSE:KEYS) with a Positive and raises the price target from $300 to $415.

raw.headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on Keysight Techs, Raises Price Target to $415

headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock to Keep an Eye On and 2 We Turn Down
summary: Large-cap stocks usually command their industries because they have the scale to drive market trends. The flip side though is that their sheer size can limit growth as expanding further becomes an increasingly challenging task.

raw.headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock to Keep an Eye On and 2 We Turn Down
raw.summary: Large-cap stocks usually command their industries because they have the scale to drive market trends. The flip side though is that their sheer size can limit growth as expanding further becomes an increasingly challenging task.

headline: How The Investment Narrative For Keysight Technologies (KEYS) Is Shifting Around AI And Wireline Growth
summary: Keysight Technologies has seen its analyst fair value move from US$315.15 to US$323.00, a modest uplift that reflects a refreshed view of the stock’s long term potential. This adjustment lines up with a wave of Street research, where many firms have raised price targets after stronger fiscal Q1 results, higher Q2 guidance, and growing interest in the company’s AI and wireline exposure. Read on to see how these shifting price targets fit into the broader, evolving narrative you will want to...
